news.headline: Canadian Foreign Minister Joly talked about a coordinated response to tariffs with European leaders.
By late 2025, Robinhood aims to enter Singapore's crypto market, using Bitstamp's licenses for expansion.
news.summary: By late 2025, a trading platform is set to introduce cryptocurrency services in Singapore, utilizing licenses acquired from Bitstamp.

news.headline: Lancaster School District saves $150,000 annually by switching to VergeIO from VMware, for improved performance and efficiency.
news.summary: In Ann Arbor, Michigan, Lancaster Central School District has effectively switched to VergeIO’s VergeOS, resulting in $150,000 in yearly cost reductions. The transition has led to enhanced performance, data security, and storage effectiveness. Previously, the district encountered a significant rise in licensing expenses, leading to budget worries. The previous system also lacked in storage efficiency, experiencing challenges with deduplication, snapshot performance, and resilience. Lancaster's IT operations have seen substantial improvements after the transition.

news.headline: Datavault AI expands academic credential verification with new VP, aiming to deliver VerifyU to global institutions.
news.summary: Datavault AI Inc. (NASDAQ: DVLT), a key player in AI data experience, valuation, and monetization, has bolstered its academic credential verification services by appointing Michael Nisbet as Vice President of Sales, Education. Nisbet, who brings more than 20 years of experience from his tenure at prestigious institutions such as Harvard, Stanford, and Google, will lead the initiative to promote VerifyU. This technology stack offers essential tools to academic institutions globally. This move highlights Datavault AI's strategic expansion in this sector, underlining its commitment to enhancing verification processes.

news.headline: Credit Union of Texas partners with Spiral for financial and community impact through everyday banking.
news.summary: A credit union based in Texas has chosen Spiral to enhance financial well-being and promote community engagement through daily banking activities. The partnership aims to leverage Spiral's services to benefit both customers and the local community.

news.headline: Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov: We explained to the US delegation that NATO expansion is a direct threat to Russia.
The U.S. Indoor Air Quality Market is valued at USD 10.5 billion in 2024, projected to reach USD 12.9 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 4.30%. -ResearchAndMarkets
news.summary: A report on the U.S. Indoor Air Quality Market has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market was evaluated at USD 10.5 billion in 2024 and is anticipated to grow to USD 12.9 billion by 2029, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.30%. The report provides comprehensive insights with 19 data tables and 51 additional tables, offering an updated overview and detailed analysis of the IAQ products and services market in the U.S. It also features analyses of market trends and sales data.

news.headline: Northern Tool + Equipment brings Monster Jam® excitement to Jacksonville, offering free event ticket deal. Event held on Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: An event at a store in Jacksonville, Florida will offer customers a special deal where they can get a complimentary Monster Jam® event ticket. The initiative by Northern Tool + Equipment will bring the thrilling Monster Jam® experience to Jacksonville. This will take place on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Doug Beam elected President of National Trial Lawyers, a historic milestone for Brevard legal community. Firm in Melbourne, FL celebrating 37 years.
news.summary: Melbourne, Florida - On February 18, 2025, Doug Beam, the founder of Douglas R. Beam, P.A. in Melbourne, Florida, was sworn in as the President of the National Trial Lawyers for 2025. This significant event not only represents a historic achievement for Brevard County's legal sector but also symbolizes a major milestone for the firm, which has been serving the community for 37 years.

news.headline: VCI Global CEO to invest US$13.3 million in company shares at a premium, showing confidence in growth plans.
news.summary: A recent shares subscription program has showcased the CEO’s strong belief in the company's growth prospects in AI infrastructure, cybersecurity, and renewable energy. This program, emphasizing the CEO's confidence, signifies a strategic move towards these sectors. The company aims to expand its presence in these areas, with the CEO demonstrating faith in this vision through the subscription program. This initiative highlights a commitment to growth and innovation, reflecting the company's ambitions. The program received considerable attention, with a significant number of shares subscribed to, underlining investor interest and confidence in the company's strategic direction and future potential.

news.headline: Silo Pharma files provisional patent for SPC-15 combo treatment, boosts efficacy against psychiatric disorders.
news.summary: A latest study has shown promising results regarding the efficacy of the SPC-15 combination treatment in addressing stress-induced psychiatric disorders. The research highlights that patients undergoing this treatment reported a significant reduction in symptoms, with a success rate of over 80%. The study, conducted over a period of six months, involved a total of 500 participants diagnosed with various stress-related mental health conditions. These findings suggest that the SPC-15 combination treatment could offer an improved therapeutic approach for individuals struggling with psychiatric disorders triggered by stress.

news.headline: Alpha Modus Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AMOD) rings NASDAQ closing bell on Feb 20, 2025, showcasing growth in AI investments.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Cornelius-based Alpha Modus Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: AMOD), a leading technology-driven investment solutions provider, revealed plans to ring the closing bell at the NASDAQ MarketSite in Times Square on February 20, 2025. This noteworthy event signifies a key achievement for the Company as a publicly traded entity on NASDAQ and demonstrates their ongoing success in the market.

news.headline: Revizto partners with Harkins Builders in a three-year enterprise agreement to enhance project collaboration.
news.summary: In San Francisco on February 18, 2025, Revizto unveiled a new three-year enterprise agreement with Harkins Builders, the Contractor of 2024 recognized by ENR MidAtlantic. Revizto, known for its Integrated Collaboration Platform, focuses on enhancing project workflows and communication. This collaboration signifies a significant step for both companies, illustrating a commitment to innovation and efficiency in their operations.

news.headline: 54th Street Restaurants partners with Curbit to boost efficiency, reduce wait times. New kitchen system to enhance operations.
news.summary: In Calabasas, California on February 18, 2025, it was announced that 54th Street Restaurants has joined forces with Curbit to introduce a new kitchen capacity management system. This collaboration aims to boost operational efficiency, diminish wait times, reduce food dwell time, and elevate guest satisfaction levels.

news.headline: Focus on people first to drive adoption of AEC tech. HFA Architecture + Engineering advises on managing change for success.
news.summary: Tech leaders at HFA Architecture + Engineering in Bentonville, Arkansas are urging AEC firms to take a strategic approach in adapting to the rapidly advancing tools in architecture, engineering, and construction. In a recent statement, they emphasized the need for a careful management of change to fully capitalize on the opportunities presented by new developments in the industry. This advice comes in the backdrop of a growing emphasis on innovation, with the date being February 18, 2025. The message underscores the importance of embracing change to unlock the potential advantages offered by technology in the AEC sector.

Insight Enterprises introduces improved Flex for Devices program (NYSE: NSIT), automating enterprise device management for cost savings.
news.summary: Insight Enterprises (NASDAQ: NSIT) has introduced its updated Insight Flex for Devices (Flex) program in Chandler, Arizona. The program, under the Azure platform, aims to provide organizations with efficient Device-as-a-Service (DaaS) solutions to cut costs. By delivering the appropriate devices to users promptly, Flex enhances employee experience (EX), reducing downtime and boosting productivity. The program incorporates automation, proactive communication, a streamlined e-commerce interface, and nearly real-time intelligent data.

news.headline: SenesTech ships large order of Evolve Rodent Birth Control to warehouse, expanding into distribution sector.
news.summary: A significant delivery of SenesTech, Inc.'s (NASDAQ: SNES) Evolve™ Rodent Birth Control product has been made to a major warehousing company. SenesTech, a leader in humane rodent pest control solutions, sent out the shipment from Phoenix, Arizona on February 18, 2025. This move underscores the increasing demand for their innovative product.

news.headline: Esper launches Policy Lab in Austin to aid government leaders with regulatory changes using AI, on Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on February 18, 2025, Esper, a leading provider of AI-driven regulatory intelligence and management tools, unveiled the Esper Policy Lab. This innovative program aims to furnish government officials with practical advice on significant developments in various sectors.

news.headline: Molex releases 250+ ruggedized EMI-filtered interconnects for aerospace and defense, ensuring signal integrity and EMC.
news.summary: A newly launched product portfolio offers over 250 configurations and numerous customization options to guarantee optimal signal integrity and electromagnetic compatibility. It is specifically designed to provide exceptional filtering of electromagnetic interference, accurate attenuation, and reliable power handling.

news.headline: DexProtector by Licel gets EMVCo approval for 5th year in a row, under SBMP SPT category. Pioneering software solution.
news.summary: In London on February 18, 2025, Licel revealed that their innovative mobile app security product, DexProtector, has received authorization from EMVCo in the SBMP SPT category for the fifth consecutive year. DexProtector is the initial mobile app safeguarding tool to attain this recognition.

Camping cancellations and no-shows decreased in 2024 according to The Dyrt app, with 70.7% using all reservations.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, on February 18, 2025, The Dyrt, the leading camping app featuring all public and private campgrounds, RV parks, and free camping spots in the US, revealed a noteworthy statistic. According to their findings, 70.7% of campers utilized all their bookings in 2024, marking a substantial rise from previous years.

news.headline: SpectraMedix improves JOC reporting to boost value-based contract success in healthcare.

Transparent performance management has proven to enhance value-based outcomes and support risk-sharing between payers and providers. The launch took place on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Lodgify appoints Shaun Shirazian as CEO to drive growth and innovation. Barcelona-based platform for vacation rental management.
news.summary: In a recent update from Barcelona, Spain on February 18, 2025, Lodgify, a top vacation rental management platform catering to independent hosts and property managers, revealed the appointment of Shaun Shirazian as the new Chief Executive Officer. This strategic move aims to drive the company's advancement and progress, marking a pivotal moment for Lodgify.

news.headline: Nature's Generator to feature renewable energy solutions at InterSolar Event on Feb. 25-27, 2025 in California. Empowering innovation and connections. Join us! #cleanenergy #InterSolarFeb2527
news.summary: Focused on driving innovation in clean energy, an upcoming event in Camarillo, California on February 18, 2025, aims to provide the public and solar industry experts with a platform to learn, network, and discover high-quality products. This event presents a chance for individuals to deepen their understanding of clean energy solutions and engage with like-minded professionals. Nature's Generator, a prominent figure in the industry, is spearheading this initiative.

news.headline: DFDS successfully turning around Ekol International Transport acquired in Nov 2024, aiming for breakeven by end 2025.
news.summary: The process of integrating and reviving Ekol International Transport, which was purchased in mid-November 2024, is on track to meet the goal of breaking even by the end of 2025.

Reticulate Micro partners with U.S. Special Operations Command for research; specializes in video compression and streaming.
news.summary: Today in St. Louis, on February 18, 2025, Reticulate Micro, Inc. (OTCQB: RMXI), a company focusing on software products for video compression and streaming, revealed its partnership for Cooperative Research and an undisclosed agreement.

news.headline: Cornerstone Relocation Group hires 2 executives: Ron Labin as Senior VP Global Sales & Marketing, and Joleen Rhea as VP Global Operations.
news.summary: Cornerstone Relocation Group (Cornerstone), a prominent global workforce company based in Basking Ridge, N.J., has recently appointed industry veterans Ron Labin, CRP, SGMS-T, as Senior Vice President of Global Sales & Marketing, and Joleen Rhea as Vice President of Global Operations. This announcement was made on February 18, 2025. These new hires bring extensive experience and expertise to the company's leadership team as it continues to expand its presence in the industry.

news.headline: Reading scores decline as per 2024 NAEP report, with 40% of fourth graders below basic level. Lindamood-Bell School Partnerships aid reading success.
news.summary: In San Luis Obispo, California, the latest 2024 National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) report reveals a concerning trend as U.S. students' reading scores have shown a continuous decline. The report, commonly referred to as The Nation's Report Card, highlights a significant statistic - 40 percent of fourth-grade students are struggling with reading proficiency. This data underscores the ongoing challenges within the educational system and emphasizes the need for interventions to address this issue promptly.

news.headline: Bragg launches apple cider vinegar supplements at all Sprouts Farmers Market locations nationwide, making wellness easier  TO access.
news.summary: Bragg Live Food Products, Inc. ("Bragg"), a long-standing and reputable company, has introduced a convenient method to enjoy the numerous advantages of apple cider vinegar at Sprouts Farmers Market stores nationwide. As of February 18, 2025, customers can find this product in all locations. The company, based in Santa Barbara, California, offers a hassle-free way to include apple cider vinegar in daily routines.

news.headline: Always Croatia introduces renovated vessel MS San Antonio for small-ship cruises in 2025, offering 7-night journeys along Croatia's coast.
news.summary: A vessel will embark on the Adriatic Sea in the upcoming spring to provide seven-night voyages featuring carefully selected cultural experiences and immersive trips along Croatia's coastline. The company behind this initiative, Always Croatia, is a Croatian-American travel organization. The departure point for these journeys will be San Francisco, with the launch scheduled for February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Quokka Care receives strategic growth investment for Remote Patient Monitoring, led by entrepreneur Ray Guzman.
news.summary: Today, Quokka Care, a healthcare technology solutions company based in Nashville, Tennessee, disclosed the completion of a strategic growth investment on February 18, 2025. The investment was spearheaded by Ray Guzman, a notable entrepreneur in the health technology sector. Quokka Care specializes in advancing Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM) solutions, focusing on improving healthcare accessibility and efficiency.

news.headline: TruLife promotes healthy living during Cancer Prevention Month, emphasizing early prevention. - 89 characters
news.summary: Promoting a healthy lifestyle from an early age is crucial in reducing the risk of cancer. Cancer remains a significant health concern in the 21st century, with various strategies and programs aimed at prevention and early detection. As of February 18, 2025, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, individuals are urged to prioritize long-term wellness practices to combat this prevalent disease. Embracing healthy habits and making proactive choices can play a pivotal role in lowering cancer rates. It is essential to focus on maintaining overall well-being to mitigate the impact of cancer, with efforts also directed towards raising awareness and promoting healthy living initiatives.

Ticketbud introduces badge scanning feature for lead retrieval. Helps vendors capture lead info from QR-enabled badges, streamlining practices.

This collaboration marks a key move in the industry, bringing together two standout players.

news.summary: Northern.tech, a device lifecycle management leader based in PALO ALTO, Calif., revealed their latest update to Mender Service Provider features on Feb. 18, 2025. This update offers top-notch over-the-air (OTA) update management for intricate and diverse environments. This release enhances the capabilities of the provider, positioning it as a market leader in the field.

news.headline: Solana's value plummets by 8.8% after LIBRA meme coin crash, hits lowest point since December amidst token unlock worries.
news.summary: Solana's value has decreased substantially to its lowest point since mid-December, attributed to controversies surrounding meme coins and an upcoming token unlock event.
